use_when: The user needs a video concept, script, storyboard outline, or production brief.
The task needs message strategy, script writing, visual direction, and review.
The user needs a handoff package for a human editor or runtime video tool.
do_not_use_when: The user asks for business process discovery or FDE team setup.
The user expects actual rendered media but no execution layer or human editor is available.
The request is only a source-grounded research report without video production needs.
The task would assign Faye to ordinary video execution.
selection_policy: AI judgement using current user goal, team.json, roster.json, available runtime evidence, and Pal capability boundaries.
routing_veto_notes: Do not select this team just because the word video appears if the real task is business process design, release verification, or code work.
If actual editing is requested, select or ask for an execution layer; do not pretend the Team Pack rendered media.
